Description: Verify a new user can register with valid details
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /register 2. Enter full name, email, password 3. Click Register
Test Data: Name: John Doe, Email: john@test.com, Password: Test@1234
Expected Output: User account created; redirected to login page with success message
Actual Output: New user account was created successfully and the system redirected to the login page with a success confirmation message

Description: Verify a registered user can log in successfully
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /login 2. Enter email and password 3. Click Login
Expected Output: User is authenticated; authUser saved in localStorage; redirected to dashboard
Actual Output: User authenticated successfully; authUser object stored in localStorage; redirected to user dashboard

Description: Verify admin login fails with wrong password
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /admin-login 2. Enter wrong password 3. Click Login
Expected Output: Error message displayed; no redirect; user stays on login page
Actual Output: Login failed with an error message Invalid credentials displayed; page remained on admin login screen

Description: Verify registration fails when using an already registered email
Preconditions: An account with john@test.com already exists in the database
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /register 2. Enter an already registered email 3. Fill other fields 4. Click Register
Expected Output: Error message shown indicating email is already in use; user stays on registration page
Actual Output: Registration failed with an error message indicating the email is already registered; user remained on the registration form

Description: Verify that entering an invalid email format shows a validation error
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /register 2. Enter invalid email format 3. Fill other fields 4. Click Register
Expected Output: Inline validation error message appears; form not submitted
Actual Output: Validation error displayed below email field indicating invalid format; form submission was prevented

Description: Verify that a password not meeting requirements shows a validation error
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /register 2. Enter valid name and email 3. Enter a weak password 4. Click Register
Expected Output: Password strength validation error displayed; registration blocked
Actual Output: Validation error appeared indicating password must meet complexity requirements; registration was blocked

Description: Verify a logged-in user can log out successfully
Test Steps: 1. Login as user 2. Click Logout button in navigation bar 3. Verify session is terminated
Expected Output: User logged out; authUser cleared from localStorage; redirected to login page
Actual Output: User was logged out successfully; authUser was cleared from localStorage and the browser redirected to the login page

Description: Verify user can request a password reset via email
Preconditions: User account exists in the database
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /forgot-password 2. Enter registered email address 3. Click Send Reset Link
Expected Output: Confirmation message shown; password reset email sent to registered address
Actual Output: Success confirmation displayed indicating reset link was sent to the registered email address

Description: Verify a user can update their display name successfully
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Profile page 2. Click Edit on display name field 3. Enter new name 4. Click Save
Expected Output: Name updated successfully; confirmation shown; profile reflects new name
Actual Output: Display name updated to Jane Doe; success message appeared and profile page reflected the change immediately

Description: Verify admin can log in using correct admin credentials
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /admin-login 2. Enter valid admin email and password 3. Click Login
Expected Output: Admin authenticated; redirected to Admin Dashboard with full access
Actual Output: Admin logged in successfully; browser redirected to admin dashboard with full administrative controls visible
